# HISS Finance

> HISS is compilation and verification software on Robinhood Chain (mainnet 4663, testnet 46630). It turns market ideas and vault manifests into structured, hash-verified artifacts and reads verified on-chain state. It never takes custody, never stores wallet or brokerage credentials, never signs a transaction, and never places a brokerage order. Not affiliated with Robinhood, Bankr, or Chainlink. Not investment advice.

What HISS never does: stores brokerage or wallet credentials; sends orders (`liveOrderSent` is hard-typed `false` in every artifact); takes custody; collects location; or claims affiliation with Robinhood, Bankr, or Chainlink.

State discipline everywhere: planned ≠ funded ≠ claimable. A hash or prepared intent is data; funding is owner-gated and chain-verified; value is received only on an on-chain event. A failed read is "unknown" — never "not deployed", never "live".

This repository publishes the PUBLIC interface materials: exact contract ABIs, canonical Robinhood Chain addresses with verification status, Solidity interfaces, and the HISS agent skill packs. It contains no deployment scripts, owner-action tooling, or credentials.

## Skills

- [hiss-coilops](skills/hiss-coilops/SKILL.md): Coil a market thesis into a versioned, bounded playbook; validate, score, compile, receipt. Never executes trades.
- [hiss-risk-fuses](skills/hiss-risk-fuses/SKILL.md): The typed, binding constraints (position/notional/turnover caps, no-options/no-margin, oracle and receipt stops) that bound any compiled artifact.
- [hiss-receipts](skills/hiss-receipts/SKILL.md): Canonical-JSON SHA-256 workflow-integrity proofs and verification.
- [hiss-bankrbot-robinhood](skills/hiss-bankrbot-robinhood/SKILL.md): The Bankrbot → HISS → Robinhood MCP autonomy path — paper-first, ack-gated, audited.
- [hiss-vault-agent-kit](skills/hiss-vault-agent-kit/SKILL.md): Discover, read, create, and prepare USDG deposits into HISS Creator Vaults; the agent prepares, the wallet or Safe signs.
- [hiss-staking](skills/hiss-staking/SKILL.md): Stake $HISS for xHISS; exact-amount approvals, 72-hour cooldown, 2-day redeem window, fee-funded 24-hour injections.
- [hiss-rewards](skills/hiss-rewards/SKILL.md): The 50/15/15/10/10 verified-HISS-trading-fee split (HISS Reward Method V2, incl. economic burn to the dead address) and the 2-of-3 Treasury Safe.
- [hiss-stock-tokens](skills/hiss-stock-tokens/SKILL.md): Prepare and reconcile Bankr trades of Robinhood Chain tokenized stocks (Rail B), USDG settlement; tokenized exposure, not direct ownership.
- [hiss-mcp](skills/hiss-mcp/SKILL.md): Use the local HISS stdio MCP server and its tool families.
- [hiss-security-boundaries](skills/hiss-security-boundaries/SKILL.md): Custody, credential, consent, and the three-rail Bankr boundaries in depth.
- [hiss-robinhood-agentic](skills/hiss-robinhood-agentic/SKILL.md): Umbrella agentic-trading skill — run a Coil against the user's OWN Robinhood Trading MCP session; truth model, LiveAutonomyGrant, kill/pause/revoke. HISS compiles/verifies; the user's session executes.
- [hiss-robinhood-portfolio](skills/hiss-robinhood-portfolio/SKILL.md): Granted-account-scoped reads (default: the granted account fingerprint only).
- [hiss-robinhood-market-intelligence](skills/hiss-robinhood-market-intelligence/SKILL.md): Quotes/historicals/indicators/scanner — surfaced as CANDIDATES, never orders.
- [hiss-robinhood-equities](skills/hiss-robinhood-equities/SKILL.md): Equity review → place → reconcile in the user's own session; no bypass, no blind retry.
- [hiss-robinhood-options](skills/hiss-robinhood-options/SKILL.md): Options — capability-gated, fail-closed until a session proves the capability.
- [hiss-coil-runner](skills/hiss-coil-runner/SKILL.md): The Coil runtime loop — at-most-once submit, reconcile before retry.
- [hiss-agentic-ledger](skills/hiss-agentic-ledger/SKILL.md): Local journal + three-layer receipt spine; user-held custody; export/delete.
- [hiss-cross-rail-handoff](skills/hiss-cross-rail-handoff/SKILL.md): Prepared brokerage↔Robinhood Chain handoffs with a MANUAL boundary — reconciliation, never a bridge.
- [hiss-price-mesh](skills/hiss-price-mesh/SKILL.md): The price/valuation mesh — partial propagates, null is never zero, reference ≠ executable; side-aware vault marks (reporting mid / ask deposit / bid redemption) from the designed, activation-gated 24/7 architecture.
- [Robinhood MCP capability manifest](schemas/robinhood-mcp/): Sanitized machine-readable capability model (snapshot + family map + schema) the agentic skills declare against.

## Contracts

- [Contracts README](contracts/README.md): What's public, verification/explorer links, compiler settings, the ERC-8056 corporate-action rule.
- [Deployment addresses (chain 4663)](contracts/deployments/robinhood-chain-mainnet.json): Canonical addresses, deployed-bytecode keccak hashes, verification status, Blockscout links.
- ABIs: `contracts/abi/*.json` — VaultFactory, HissUsdGVault, VaultAssetRegistry, VaultReceiptRegistry, VaultAccessPolicy, VaultFeeDistributor, VaultDepositReadinessRegistry, VaultLegalReadinessRegistry, HissOracleAdapter, UniswapV4RebalanceAdapter, XHissVault, and the reward distributors.
- Interfaces: `contracts/src/interfaces/*.sol` — IVaultFactory, IHissUsdGVault, IXHissVault, IVaultReceiptRegistry, IVaultFeeDistributor, IVaultRebalanceAdapter, IVaultAssetRegistry, IVaultAccessPolicy, IVaultDepositReadinessRegistry, IHissOracleAdapter.

## Key facts

- Hosts: application + HTTP API https://app.hiss.finance · documentation https://docs.hiss.finance · marketing + agent files https://www.hiss.finance. Legacy www /app/* and /docs/* URLs 308-redirect (one hop) to their canonical hosts. Each host serves its own /llms.txt (www: identity + top-level surfaces · app: application surfaces · docs: full documentation map); the expanded llms-full.txt lives on the docs host. Explorer: https://robinhoodchain.blockscout.com
- VaultFactory `0x278d237c6890a5f7101296a9021ed9D26c821810` · flagship HISS Vault `0x6d962604df1c6c5ef4b59d88863600fe71bb63e6` · xHISS vault `0x699861D2C546ab86a7f2AE97ffc7aF89f3FF67Be`.
- $HISS token `0x47162135cc8fb253f939Bd70e3D2B83075eaeBa3` (18 decimals, verified) · Treasury Safe (2-of-3) `0xF100Fc28dd1721C698046Dbd60408c523b69e36c`.
- Compiler: solc 0.8.24, optimizer 200 runs, EVM cancun, bytecode_hash none.
- 24/7 vault architecture is DESIGNED, tested, and UNDEPLOYED: five execution modes (MULTI_VENUE_EXECUTABLE / SINGLE_VENUE_BOUNDED / BATCH_EXECUTABLE / IN_KIND_ONLY / TEMPORARILY_HALTED), three settlement lanes (instant / batch-netting / in-kind unconditional exit), Price Mesh V2 side-aware marks (reporting mid / ask deposit / bid redemption), dynamic safe-notional, calendar-is-context-only, corporate-action multiplier applied exactly once (on-chain feed already adjusted; REST /prices raw), smallest-scope degrade. Liquidity is real but thin and single-venue today. Production 24/7 settlement is NOT active; the V2 vault is undeployed; activation is separately gated behind independent audits + owner authorization; nothing is funded, live, or deployed. See docs/vaults/24-7-architecture.md.
- Reward split of verified HISS trading fees only (HISS Reward Method V2, 50/15/15/10/10): 50% xHISS stakers / 15% vault providers / 15% vault contributors (former depositor cohort; share-seconds unchanged) / 10% Treasury Safe / 10% economic burn to the dead address 0x000000000000000000000000000000000000dEaD (leaves circulation but does NOT reduce HISS.totalSupply); claimed WETH 100% to the Safe. Undeployed distributor recipients stay null. V1 50/30/10/10 is historical. The website + first-party app tools are free (packages open-source).
